title: Apple agrees to pay $250 million to iPhone 15 and 16 users to settle lawsuit over missing Siri AI features
summary: Apple has settled a lawsuit over misleading users regarding its Apple Intelligence features, agreeing to pay $250 million. The settlement, pending approval, will compensate iPhone 15 and 16 buyers. The company faces criticism for delays in its promised Siri update and AI capabilities.

title: Pixxel, Sarvam to build India’s first orbital data centre satellite amid space computing push
summary: India is taking early steps toward space-based computing as Pixxel and Sarvam partner to build an orbital data centre satellite. The move comes amid rising global interest and energy constraints, though experts caution that high launch costs and technical challenges may limit near term viability

title: Samsung Galaxy smartwatches bring premium features at better prices now
summary: Samsung Galaxy smartwatches are now available at attractive prices, making it easier to upgrade to premium features like health tracking, AMOLED displays, and long battery life without stretching your budget.

title: OpenAI quietly gave US government early access to its powerful GPT-5.5 model for ‘national security testing’

title: Meet Remy: Google is creating a ‘24/7 personal agent’ to manage your digital life, says report
summary: Google is developing a personal agent named Remy for its Gemini app, designed to act on users' behalf across various tasks. Similar to the AI platform OpenClaw, Remy will integrate with Google's ecosystem, learning user preferences and managing tasks proactively.

title: ChatGPT becomes smarter, less verbose and better at remembering you with new GPT-5.5 Instant update
summary: OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5 Instant, an upgrade over GPT-5.3 Instant, featuring improved accuracy and clarity. The model reduces hallucinations by 52.5% and enhances performance in everyday tasks, while also offering better memory capabilities and personalization options for users.

title: Paytm posts first-ever annual profit of Rs 552 crore in FY26
summary: Digital payments major Paytm achieved its first full year of profit in FY26, reporting a net profit of Rs 552 crore. This turnaround was driven by cost control and significant revenue growth from financial services, with operating revenue rising 22% to Rs 8,437 crore.

title: Meesho Q4 revenue jumps 47%; operating losses widen on aggressive growth push
summary: CEO Vidit Aatrey said that over 70% of the company’s code now is being written using artificial intelligence. More than three fourths of Meesho's orders come through its AI recommendation engine, underscoring the ecommerce marketplace's efforts on driving growth using frontier technology.
